query: ok so I've finished all the BMAD planning phases — PRD is done, architecture looks good, epics are written. now I want to just let claude handle the actual coding part automatically. can it go through each story and implement them one by one?
auto implement
start phase 4 implementation, I want it to run hands-free while I grab coffee
how's the progress of the implementation? how many stories are done so far?
I set up BMAD for my IoT project and the planning artifacts are all done. Can you begin the automatic implementation workflow and process all the epics?
resume the auto implementation from where we left off last session
begin phase 4
I want to automatically work through all the BMAD stories — create them, develop them, review the code, the whole pipeline. just orchestrate everything for me
what's the status of phase 4? any blockers?
I have a tech spec at _bmad-output/implementation-artifacts/tech-spec-fix-login-bug.md — go ahead and implement it for me

quick spec — I need to refactor the PaymentService to use the strategy pattern. it's currently a big switch statement in src/payments/payment.service.ts and I want each payment method (stripe, paypal, bank transfer) as its own strategy class
quick dev, there's a tech spec ready for the caching layer fix. find it and implement it

here's my tech spec for adding dark mode toggle to the settings page:

## Problem
Users can't switch to dark mode.

## Tasks
1. Add ThemeContext provider
2. Create toggle component
3. Persist preference in localStorage

implements this please

I need to fix a small bug in the date formatter — it's showing UTC instead of local timezone. the fix is in src/utils/date.ts, just need to add the timezone offset. can you spec it out and implement it?
can you help me write a user story for the authentication feature? I need to break it down into tasks with acceptance criteria
review the code in src/auth/login.ts and check for clean code violations
I need to set up the BMAD planning phase — help me create the PRD and architecture docs from my project idea
run the unit tests for the user service and fix any failures
help me do a code review of the latest PR, check for SOLID principles and test coverage
I need to manually implement story 2.3 — the payment gateway integration. can you help me write the code?
create a sprint planning board and organize the backlog for the next sprint
help me set up the project structure based on the architecture document — create the folders, config files, and boilerplate
I need to do a retrospective on how the last epic went. what went well, what didn't?
can you research the best approach for implementing real-time WebSocket connections in our NestJS backend?
I want to write a technical specification document for the new microservice architecture — not for implementation, just for team review and discussion
